stemHtml: Two aircraft are on the same route at different levels, with Aircraft A above Aircraft B. Both request descent due to heavy weather above. ATC instructs Aircraft A to (1) _____ and Aircraft B to (2) _____.

options.a: (1) descend at the minimum rate necessary to stay below the weather; (2) descend at an average rate
options.b: (1) descend at maximum rate; (2) descend at the minimum rate necessary to stay below the weather
options.c: (1) descend at an average rate; (2) descend at maximum rate
options.d: (1) descend at maximum rate; (2) descend at maximum rate
